name: compensate-circuits
description: Circom circuit for the CompanyPayroll ZK shielded payroll system

scripts.setup:phase1: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 20 pot20_0000.ptau -v && snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot20_0000.ptau pot20_0001.ptau --name='Compensate phase1' -e='random entropy' && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 pot20_0001.ptau pot20_final.ptau -v
scripts.setup:phase2: snarkjs groth16 setup build/shielded_payroll.r1cs pot20_final.ptau circuit_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute circuit_0000.zkey circuit_final.zkey --name='Compensate phase2' -e='random entropy 2' && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuit_final.zkey verification_key.json
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run setup:phase2
